overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, modular, web-based School Management ERP for Indian schools with full cPanel MySQL backend. Supports multi-school/branch operations, all user roles (Super Admin, Admin, Teacher, Parent, Student, Driver), and real-time data sync across all devices. Includes Student Information, Fees Collection, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Transport, Inventory, Communication, Template Studio, and more.
features: MySQL database backend via PHP REST API on cPanel
Real-time data sync across all devices
30+ modules: Students, Fees, Attendance, HR, Academics, Transport, Inventory
Complete cPanel deployment guide and documentation
Backup and restore with SQL dumps
